---
title: "The Framework Design"
---

This cluster specifies how the analytical 
environment is built — the artefact governance 
architecture, the thin-waist interface design, 
the modelling methods available at each layer, 
and the domain translation that makes the 
framework instantiable in a specific industrial 
context.

The architecture section (modular design and 
artefact governance) is the intellectual core 
of the framework. The modelling methods section 
provides the toolbox. Domain translation shows 
how general principles become specific to 
industrial process heat.

---
